## Intel Q2 2026 Earnings Preview: Street Consensus at $0.21 EPS, Report Date July 23

$0.21 is the bar; a miss or guide-cut in the current environment where the AI chip rally's sustainability is being questioned (see related INTC cluster) could weigh on the broader semiconductor group beyond INTC itself.

- Street consensus EPS estimate for Q2 2026 is $0.21 per the AlphaStreet preview
- Report is scheduled for July 23 — imminent
- Preview provides a concrete setup number against which the print can be measured
- High-confidence tag; this is a standard pre-earnings estimate compilation, not a directional call
